name: Kenneth Duda
background: Kenneth Duda is a co-founder of Arista and has served as our Chief Technology Officer and Senior Vice President, Software Engineering since September 2011. He previously served as our Vice President, Software Engineering from 2004 to 2011. Prior to Arista, Dr. Duda was a co-founder of Granite Systems and held engineering roles at Cisco Systems. Dr. Duda holds a B.S. and M.S. in Computer Science and Electrical Engineering from MIT and a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Stanford University.

companies.name: Arista Networks, Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Chief Technology Officer and Senior Vice President, Software Engineering
